title: Sohar Health - Insurance Eligibility Verification API
problem: Healthcare providers and digital health companies need reliable, real-time insurance eligibility verification through APIs.
solution: API-first insurance eligibility verification platform. Real-time coverage checks, benefits verification, and payer connectivity. Developer-friendly APIs for integration into digital health applications.
technology: API platform, X12 270/271 transactions, real-time payer connectivity
target_customer: Digital health companies, telehealth platforms, healthcare providers
varden_fit: HIGH — Sohar Health's API-first approach is exactly what European digital health companies need for eligibility verification.
notes: CONTRARIAN: API-first eligibility verification is the modern approach. European digital health platforms lack reliable eligibility APIs.
